A

AlertSystem - Class in <Unnamed>
Purpose: This program represents the AlertSystem class, which manages notification dispatching in a smart home system.
AlertSystem(NotificationMedium) - Constructor for class AlertSystem
Constructs an AlertSystem with an initial delivery medium.

E

EmailService - Class in <Unnamed>
Purpose: This program represents the EmailService class, which implements the NotificationMedium interface for sending e-mail notifications.
EmailService() - Constructor for class EmailService
 

G

getLog() - Method in class AlertSystem
Returns a copy of the session log so callers cannot mutate the internal list.

M

main(String[]) - Static method in class AlertSystem
Demonstrates the notification system from the command line.

N

NotificationMedium - Interface in <Unnamed>
Purpose: This program represents the NotificationMedium interface, which defines the contract for any notification delivery channel.
notifyUser(String) - Method in class AlertSystem
Dispatches a message through the currently active medium and appends a timestamped entry to the session log.

P

printLog() - Method in class AlertSystem
Prints every log entry to standard output, preceded by a header line.

S

send(String) - Method in class EmailService
Simulates sending a message as an e-mail notification.
send(String) - Method in interface NotificationMedium
Delivers a notification to the user using this medium.
send(String) - Method in class SMSService
Simulates sending a message as an SMS notification.
send(String) - Method in class WhatsAppService
Simulates sending a message as a WhatsApp notification.
setMedium(NotificationMedium) - Method in class AlertSystem
Replaces the active delivery channel with medium.
SMSService - Class in <Unnamed>
Purpose: This program represents the SMSService class, which implements the NotificationMedium interface for sending SMS notifications.
SMSService() - Constructor for class SMSService
 

W

WhatsAppService - Class in <Unnamed>
Purpose: This program represents the WhatsAppService class, which implements the NotificationMedium interface for sending WhatsApp notifications.
WhatsAppService() - Constructor for class WhatsAppService
